    "thinking": "The user is on the Rome2Rio search results page for a trip from Rome to Palermo. The cursor is positioned over the primary search results, specifically the train option which shows a duration of 11h 44m and a price range of A$45-180. The user appears to be reading the details of this travel option.",

    "frame_description": "Rome2Rio search results page showing various travel options from Rome to Palermo, including train, flight, and bus."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The cursor moves to the right side of the screen and pauses over an advertisement for Cotton On. This suggests the user's attention was briefly diverted by the visual content on the sidebar, as confirmed by the stationary cursor position at (1736, 505) in the tracking data.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 29249,

    "frame_description": "The cursor is stationary over a Cotton On advertisement on the right side of the Rome2Rio results page."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the top of the browser window to the tab bar and clicks on the tab labeled 'Access - Sociable' to switch back to the video conferencing session.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 30700,
    "time_end_ms": 30800,
    "description": "Click on the 'Access - Sociable' browser tab",
    "confidence": 1.0,

    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks on the browser tab for the Sociable session."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Following the click on the browser tab, the page content updates to show the Sociable session interface. This is a standard page navigation within the browser.",
    "type": "navigate",

    "frame_description": "The browser content changes from the Rome2Rio results to the Sociable video conferencing interface."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Once the Sociable page loads, the UI displays the video feeds of the participants. Because the researcher is sharing their screen, which includes the browser window where the call is taking place, a recursive 'hall of mirrors' visual effect occurs. This visual state persists as the user and researcher communicate.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 31500,
    "time_end_ms": 84011,
    "description": "Sociable video call interface becomes active with a recursive screen-sharing effect",

    "frame_description": "The screen shows the Sociable interface with video feeds of participants and a recursive 'hall of mirrors' effect from screen sharing."
  }
